title: role-model, a router for hybrid local/cloud AI
abstract:
Hey everyone, I'm launching role-model today: a routing protocol, a reference router runtime, and an extension for Pi that allows for better informed routing decisions.

role-model is mostly deterministic, with fallback to a controller model, that routes requests based on a chosen routing stra
abstract_zh: 嘿大家好，今天我要给大家介绍我的新发明——role-model！它就像是AI领域的交通警察，能帮你把本地和云端的数据流畅地路由起来。这货大部分时候挺靠谱的，偶尔迷路了也会乖乖交给控制器来搞定。想象一下，数据在本地和云之间穿梭，就像过家家一样轻松愉快！
